channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Rust (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Rust nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🦀 xai-org/grok-build (22154 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xai-org

📝 Repository: xai-org/grok-build

📄 Descrizione: SpaceXAI's coding agent harness and TUI. Fullscreen, mouse interactive, extensible.

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Tura-AI

📝 Repository: Tura-AI/tura

item.title: 🦀 Brain0-ai/brain0 (397 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Brain0-ai

📝 Repository: Brain0-ai/brain0

📄 Descrizione: The black box for AI-written code. Passive decision graph linking every commit to the agent prompts behind it: drift detection, DLP audit of what agents read, evidence-driven risk, MCP memory for coding agents, signed provenance attestations. One command, offline by default.

⭐ Stelle: 397

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

item.title: 🦀 Ray-Code-Svg/SuperNovaAgent (209 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Ray-Code-Svg

📝 Repository: Ray-Code-Svg/SuperNovaAgent

📄 Descrizione: SuperNova is a Windows-first desktop AI Workbench that turns chat into traceable tasks. It combines a Tauri + React Workbench, Rust Product Runtime, typed protocol, and Process Kernel so actions can produce visible artifacts, runtime receipts, replayable evidence, and controlled workspace execution.

⭐ Stelle: 209

🍴 Forks: 105

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: agent-framework agent-orchestration desktop-application harness-engineering harness-framework windows

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-14T15:19:06Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: QuintinShaw/openasr

📄 Descrizione: Local-first speech-to-text: no cloud, no telemetry, fail-closed by design. One CLI, seven model families, signed model catalog, OpenAI-compatible local API.

item.description:

item.title: 🦀 inbjo/MirrorProxy (198 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: inbjo

📝 Repository: inbjo/MirrorProxy

📄 Descrizione: All-in-one mirror acceleration,The project uses an adapter-based proxy core and already ships adapters for GitHub, Docker/OCI, Composer, npm, PyPI, Cargo, Go modules, major language repositories, developer-tool distribution services, and operating system mirrors.

⭐ Stelle: 198

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: Rust

🏷️ Topics: mirror proxy rust self-hosted
